name: 100% Whole Wheat #2
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the water and vegetable oil.
2. Add the honey and salt to the mixture and stir until well combined.
3. Sift in the whole wheat bread flour and yeast, then stir gently until all ingredients are incorporated.
4. Allow the dough to rest for 30 minutes before shaping or baking.
